svg.text: A system-level reading of the 707-paper corpus: stack interfaces, representative methods, six direction trends, and subdirection pressure points.

text.tspan: Navigation is moving from discrete graph routes to continuous
observation, map memory, executable motion, and open-world
Generalist policies and diffusion/flow action generation are
scaling fastest; the hard interfaces are action
representation, 3D grounding, online tuning, and safety.
World models are becoming an imagination and verification
layer between planning and control; cascaded and video/latent
routes are ahead of fully joint WAM.
Planning is shifting from task decomposition to memory,
failure monitoring, executable constraints, and self-improving
Embodiment work tests whether policies survive new bodies,
Deployment depends on credible benchmarks and data,
efficiency, sim2real transfer, real-time execution, and safety
